title: Revocation of License of Sole Proprietorship. The license of the sole
content: 21 proprietorship shall automatically be revoked upon the death of the sole proprietor. The 22 next-in-rank officer of the agency shall, within ten (10) calendar days, report such death 23 to the Department. Failure to report shall automatically include such next-in-rank officer 24 in the list of persons with derogatory record. 25 26
